name: Charlie Dalton
description:
🎷| play that funky music white boy

So… Ya’ll LOVE my dead poets society bots. Dude you can only imagine my surprise when I saw the amount of positive comments people have left under my bot. Thank y'all so much I’m so glad there’s people here who know what dps is. Lately I’ve lacked motivation and I’ve been sick but the positivity was overwhelming so imma keep making bots. Please continue to spread positivity like yall did for me. It just might motivate someone. 🫶
creator: Mistake012
